announcement.hitman.premise.1: But you also have %s coming to eliminate you.
tip.letter.hitman.1: Your target is %s. Eliminate them in any way possible.
tip.letter.hitman.2: %s has you as their target, and will be trying to eliminate you.
tip.letter.hitman.3: Hold Alt to see where %s is, but remember, %s can do the same for you.
tip.hitman.target_down_indirect: Your target is dead from their own actions. Now, survive.
tip.hitman.target_down: Target down. Well done, %s. Now, just survive.
tip.hitman.hunter_down_indirect: Your assassin died from their own actions. Now anyone can kill you - focus on the task.
tip.hitman.hunter_down: Well done for killing your assassin, %s. Now anyone can kill you - focus on the task.
